subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down from the Kingdom of eternity, calling those who have believed in God and His signs unto a station of sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من جبروت البقا و ینادی الذینهم آمنوا بالله و آیاته الی مقام قدس
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
